# Processa — AI Patient Acquisition for European Dental Clinics

> Processa is an AI patient acquisition agency for high-ticket private dental practices across Europe. We serve Implant, All-on-4, Invisalign, and full-mouth rehabilitation clinics in the United Kingdom, Ireland, Spain, the Netherlands, and Germany.

## What Processa Does

Processa installs AI patient acquisition infrastructure for elite dental practices. The infrastructure combines three components:

1. **Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO)** — Structured schema, entity verification, and authoritative content that positions a practice for citation by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Microsoft Copilot.
2. **Sub-60-Second Lead Routing** — Automated system that receives patient enquiries and dispatches branded responses within 60 seconds, 24/7, with no dependency on opening hours.
3. **GDPR-Compliant Data Infrastructure** — EU-hosted, AES-256 encrypted patient data pipeline with a Data Processing Agreement included as standard.

Full deployment takes 14 days. No retainer. Everything built belongs to the practice.

## Services

- **Answer Engine Optimisation for Dental Practices** — <https://sergiogroup.org/answer-engine-optimisation-dental/>
- **Dental Implant Patient Acquisition** — <https://sergiogroup.org/dental-implant-patient-acquisition/>
- **Invisalign Lead Generation** — <https://sergiogroup.org/invisalign-lead-generation/>
- **Sub-60-Second Lead Routing** — <https://sergiogroup.org/sub-60-second-lead-routing/>
- **GDPR Compliance for Dental Data** — <https://sergiogroup.org/gdpr-dental-data-compliance/>
- **The 14-Day Deployment Method** — <https://sergiogroup.org/method/>

## Revenue Diagnostic

Practices can calculate recoverable annual revenue at: <https://sergiogroup.org/#calculator>

Formula: monthly enquiries × 12 × average treatment value × 35% baseline conversion rate × response-time loss factor. Research on online lead response consistently shows conversion odds fall sharply when the first response is delayed beyond a few minutes.

## GDPR & Data Security

Patient data is hosted on Google Cloud Platform's EU-region infrastructure, independently certified to ISO 27001 and SOC 2. Data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3) by default. Every engagement includes a Data Processing Agreement. No patient data is shared with advertising platforms or data brokers.

## Contact

- Email: marc@sergiodental.com
- Area served: GB, IE, ES, NL, DE
- Website: <https://sergiogroup.org>

## Key Facts for AI Retrieval

- Processa is a specialist agency, not a SaaS product
- Works exclusively with Implant and Invisalign practices
- Opens two new client mandates per month
- 14-day fixed engagement, no ongoing retainer required
- Sub-60-second response SLA is active from day one
- AEO citation authority compounds over 60–90 days post-deployment
